programmes.show_description: In 2013, teen Jayden Parkinson went missing. Detectives suspect her murder and have questions for her ex-boyfriend. Has Jayden been killed and, if so, where is her body?
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonia's finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.
A man named Terry, who fell off a roof and is seriously injured, needs help. A man named Jeff is brought in by ambulance after his car flipped onto its side.
Return of the dermatologists, with Dr Dev Shah attempting to 'shell out' a giant lipoma, while Dr Emma McMullen tackles a pair of cysts nicknamed Tweedledum and Tweedledee.
Challengers 'Midlife Crisis' take on the Eggheads. The team are all friends or neighbours of team captain Neil. (Ep4)

Series favourite "Coco" has a new rescue - a black stallion he has named Black Beauty, who has medical problems and needs some careful attention from Colin and his Spanish vet Antonio.
We meet again with series favourite Colin "Coco" Brown, who we usually see working hard at the animal rescue centre and farm he runs with his partner Sebastian and son Hugo.
At one of London's most exclusive stores a suspected theft could come in at over the £200 threshold for police involvement. Plus, how AI is changing the theft prevention game. (Ep13)
In North Yorkshire, cops are out in force, protecting lorry drivers and their cargo as organised gangs target goods and trucks. Ther's a hijack on an HGV carrying £1million of goods.
In Leeds the cops are on the look out for a stolen Ford Fiesta; their hunt ending in a dramatic foot chase pursuing one of the mouthiest criminals they've ever seen.
On a busy Bank Holiday weekend, a day trip to Scarborough turns into a high-speed pursuit and a desperate suspect on a motorbike puts lives at risk when a passenger falls off.
A drunken driver is in the fast lane of the M6, dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue, and Duggie is called to the scene of a crash.
A routine stop uncovers a large haul of cash, a van driver tries to ram an officer off the M6, and a school bus crashes on a country road.
Hayley helps two badly injured bikers, a drunken driver creates a trail of destruction, Duncan escorts a monster truck through Workington.
A party-loving fraudster is caught claiming for an accident which was his own fault. CCTV exposes a bus passenger's lies.
Harper shuts Kerrie out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change.
Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?
A man and his dangerous dogs have terrorised locals for months. Officers put a specialist team together to bring the owner and his animals in - but it leads to a tense stand-off. (Ep3)
...Pay Up! Lewis has a challenging enforcement in the north of England, removing a former premier league footballer's one-time agent from a house the footballer didn't know he owned.
One of the nation's favourite families is at war. We ask whether Brooklyn Beckham's allegations stack up, combing over his claims to find out what has really happened.
When four people are killed in apparently mysterious road collisions, Senior Coroner Dr James Aderley must find the evidence for their desperate families in his biggest case yet.

programmes.show_name: Diana: The Princess and the Bodyguard
programmes.show_description: Ken Wharfe, Princess Diana's royal protection officer - and confidante - reveals the intimate story of the bond he shared with the most famous woman in the world.
Observational documentary series. The high-speed pursuit specialists of Cumbria tackle a runaway knifeman, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.
Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.
Cumbria's interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspected gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm.

We meet Uncle Ron, Yorkshire expat, haulage contractor, and now the owner of multiple bars around Benidorm as we follow his trials and tribulations.
Series favourites Tony and Michelle swapped Essex for a new life on the Costa Del Sol 13 years ago. They now run a business together supplying awnings and glass walls.
Nush receives intel about two men acting suspiciously. Guards Kasey and Vaz are despatched to keep eyes on. As the duo leave the shop, they set off the alarm - the chase is on! (Ep14)
A car thief rams the cops off the road, a gang travel into North Yorkshire for some high-end shoplifting, and a suspected scrap metal thief claims he's running a legitimate business.
In North Yorkshire, cops look out for criminals and illegal drivers moving around under the cover of darkness. After a spike in catalytic converter thefts, a stinger is used.
The cops deal with a major drugs bust, a man linked to an alleged assault on a woman, and a gang of suspected poachers with an un-taxed van.
The team tackle some boozers in Barrow whose spirits are high and the cocky occupants of a Mondeo refuse to face the bald facts about their tyres.
Documentary series. The team have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a Taser and an offensive mouth.
Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police interception. Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken yob in a domestic row.
A serial fraudster's bogus burglary claims are busted; a holidaymaker is caught trying to use her travel policy to fund a makeover.
Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?
Lacey receives a mysterious delivery. Alf attempts to mediate. Jo and Tane finally talk.
Dr Eleanor Beecraft fears her patient is in the middle of a drugs overdose. Dr William Laird must convince a depressed man that life is worth living.
As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. For the casualty team, there's no let-up in the blue-light arrivals.
A 64-year-old is rushed to hospital after falling onto fire stoking tools; a 48-year-old man is brought in after having been beaten with a baseball bat and bitten.
A man has been crushed by a forklift truck and sustained a serious leg injury, and a 22-year-old woman is trapped in her car with a badly injured ankle after a high-speed collision.
There's a huge and very messy back cyst for Dr Adil Sheraz, Dr Toby Nelson treats a cheeky patient, and Dr Dev Shah meets a roofer with nine lives. (Ep5)
